title: Skeleton / Loading Placeholder
description: Non-content placeholder shown while loading. Must avoid being announced as real content; keep layout stable to reduce jank.

states.name: animated
effects: Pulse/shimmer; disable animation when prefers-reduced-motion is set.

aria: Apply aria-busy="true" to the nearest meaningful container while loading.

must: Skeleton must not be focusable and must not be announced as content.
Loading states should keep layout stable (avoid major shifts).
should: Use skeleton only for short loading; for long loads, show progress or messaging.
must_not: Do not show skeleton and real content at the same time for the same area.

token_usage.notes: Use muted background for skeleton blocks.
Use UI motion token for pulse/shimmer; disable for reduced motion.
Use control radius for skeleton blocks unless circle variant.
